prompt: Detailed look at sand grains under a microscope, revealing their varied shapes and colors
prompt_refined: Photorealistic, extreme close-up microscopic view of numerous sand grains, sharply focused. Each grain exhibits a unique, intricate shape, ranging from angular and crystalline to rounded and irregular. The grains display a wide spectrum of natural colors, including translucent, white, brown, black, red, and subtle yellow hues, revealing their diverse mineral composition.
